svg.title: ATS SaaS — Problem to solution flow
svg.desc: Shows the job seeker's journey from submitting a resume, getting rejected by ATS, and how the tool solves it.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an ATS system filter resumes?')
sendPrompt('Why do good resumes get rejected by ATS?')
sendPrompt('What are the most common reasons resumes are rejected by ATS?')
sendPrompt('How does the resume upload and analysis step work?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini AI analyze a resume against a job description?')
sendPrompt('What outputs does the ATS checker produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the application tracking dashboard help job seekers?')
